message:
bench: add hostcall params_hash benchmark and refresh perf budget reports

Benchmarks (benches/extensions.rs):
- Add bench_hostcall_params_hash benchmark group measuring HostcallRequest
  params_hash() throughput for both small payloads (single tool call with
  one input field) and large payloads (64 keys + nested objects/arrays)
- Register new benchmark in the criterion_group! macro

Perf budget reports:
- Refresh PERF_BUDGETS.md, budget_events.jsonl, and budget_summary.json
  with latest measurement data

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
